message:
fix(tests): remove unused imports, dead variables, and simplify framer-motion mocks

Unused imports removed:
- Remove unused fireEvent, vi, beforeEach, afterEach imports from
  select, sheet, skip-link, keyboard-shortcuts, and service-worker tests
- Remove unused AdminRole and HealthStatus type imports from
  permissions and health checks tests

Dead variable cleanup:
- Remove matchesValue (set but never read) from useReducedMotion test
- Remove origLocalStorage, origWindow, origMatchMedia captures that
  were stored but never referenced in theme, analytics, and
  useViewTransition tests
- Remove unused result2 destructuring from useInView test

Framer-motion mock simplification:
- Replace verbose destructuring of individual animation props (initial,
  animate, transition, whileInView, viewport, exit, style, whileHover,
  whileTap) with bare { ...rest } spread in ~14 test files to eliminate
  unused variable lint warnings while maintaining pass-through behavior

Import reordering:
- Alphabetize act/fireEvent/render/screen imports per lint rules

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
